scope: Human review workbench for generated_clip artifacts, ffprobe metadata, generation run visibility, approve/reject decisions, and regeneration request drafts.

implementation.review_summary: h3VideoReviewSummary lists recent generated_clip artifacts with generation run metadata, ffprobe status, review state, accepted clip, rejection reasons, and latest revision instruction.
implementation.local_ui: H1 workbench now has a Chinese 审片 page and read-only GET /api/review summary.
implementation.approve_action: POST /api/review/approve marks a generated clip approved and writes accepted_clip_artifact_id through the existing review tool.
implementation.reject_action: POST /api/review/reject marks a generated clip rejected and creates a draft regeneration request only.
implementation.history_guard: Review summary is capped to the latest 50 generated clips while reporting total available history to keep the UI responsive.
implementation.compatibility_guard: Legacy generation runs with missing provider fields no longer crash the review summary.

validation.command: H1 workbench smoke GET / and GET /api/review on 127.0.0.1:4194
